ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the catalog */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "status" TEXT /* Inventory status of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product supplier */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "short_description" TEXT /* Short description of the product */,
  "long_description" TEXT /* Long description of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is active in the catalog */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit to uniquely identify the product in inventory */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate applicable to the product */,
  "min_stock_alert" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level that triggers an alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES product_suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "is_preferred" INTEGER /* Indicates if the supplier is preferred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product this variant belongs to */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant */,
  "variant_price" TEXT /* Price difference for this variant, if any */,
  "variant_description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  "variant_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the variant */,
  "variant_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the variant (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory transaction */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, restock) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity changed in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the transaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product this price applies to */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product at this time */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for this price */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for this price */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the price */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the price change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_bundles" (
  "bundle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bundle */,
  "bundle_name" TEXT /* Name of the bundle */,
  "bundle_price" TEXT /* Price of the bundle */,
  "bundle_description" TEXT /* Description of the bundle */,
  "bundle_image" TEXT /* Image for the bundle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bundle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bundle_items" (
  "bundle_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in a bundle */,
  "bundle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bundle this item belongs to */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product included in the bundle */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product included in the bundle */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant of the product in the bundle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bundle_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bundle_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bundle_items_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bundle_items_bundle_id FOREIGN KEY ("bundle_id") REFERENCES product_bundles ("bundle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the purchase */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Price at which the product was sold */,
  "discount_applied" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "is_loyal" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is a loyal customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product this image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the image is the primary image for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
